FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class AppBarCommand

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

A single command in a CommandBarFlyout/CommandBar — the engine analog of WinUI's ICommandBarElement (AppBarButton / AppBarToggleButton / AppBarSeparator). A Glyph + Label + optional Invoke callback. Use Separator for a divider in the overflow menu. Optional extras: AcceleratorText (the right-aligned KeyboardAcceleratorTextOverride hint), Accelerator (a REAL engine chord that invokes the command from anywhere), and Flyout (a cascading sub-menu — the secondary row shows the E76C chevron and clicking it opens the sub-menu WITHOUT closing the parent flyout, CommandBarFlyout.cpp:95-108).

public sealed record AppBarCommand : IEquatable<AppBarCommand>
Inheritance
object
AppBarCommand
Implements
IEquatable<AppBarCommand>
Inherited Members
object.Equals(object)

Constructors

AppBarCommand(string, string, Action?, AppBarCommandKind, bool, bool)

A single command in a CommandBarFlyout/CommandBar — the engine analog of WinUI's ICommandBarElement (AppBarButton / AppBarToggleButton / AppBarSeparator). A Glyph + Label + optional Invoke callback. Use Separator for a divider in the overflow menu. Optional extras: AcceleratorText (the right-aligned KeyboardAcceleratorTextOverride hint), Accelerator (a REAL engine chord that invokes the command from anywhere), and Flyout (a cascading sub-menu — the secondary row shows the E76C chevron and clicking it opens the sub-menu WITHOUT closing the parent flyout, CommandBarFlyout.cpp:95-108).

public AppBarCommand(string Glyph, string Label, Action? Invoke = null, AppBarCommandKind Kind = AppBarCommandKind.Button, bool IsChecked = false, bool Enabled = true)

Parameters

Glyph string
Label string
Invoke Action
Kind AppBarCommandKind
IsChecked bool
Enabled bool

Properties

Accelerator

A real keyboard chord that invokes Invoke from anywhere (WinUI KeyboardAccelerator).

public KeyAccelerator? Accelerator { get; init; }

Property Value

KeyAccelerator?

AcceleratorText

Right-aligned keyboard-accelerator hint (KeyboardAcceleratorTextLabel), e.g. "Ctrl+S".

public string? AcceleratorText { get; init; }

Property Value

string

Enabled 

public bool Enabled { get; init; }

Property Value

bool

Flyout

Cascading sub-menu items (secondary commands only): the row gains the E76C SubItemChevron (CommandBarFlyout_themeresources.xaml:303) and clicking it opens the sub-menu, keeping the parent open.

public IReadOnlyList<MenuFlyoutItem>? Flyout { get; init; }

Property Value

IReadOnlyList<MenuFlyoutItem>

Glyph 

public string Glyph { get; init; }

Property Value

string

Invoke 

public Action? Invoke { get; init; }

Property Value

Action

IsChecked 

public bool IsChecked { get; init; }

Property Value

bool

Kind 

public AppBarCommandKind Kind { get; init; }

Property Value

AppBarCommandKind

Label 

public string Label { get; init; }

Property Value

string

Separator

A divider row for the secondary (overflow) menu (mirrors MenuFlyoutItem.Separator).

public static AppBarCommand Separator { get; }

Property Value

AppBarCommand
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
